text.message: Gotta have this one as well
will give you nb here and were even
Am I wrong here or did he lie
kinda a grey area but u did give him his nb
I did, and he gave nothing
Bro, you are playing a game in which "deals" mean negotiations lol. All deals are strictly speaking non binding. If you really wanted the ore, the best strat there is prob not to rob me right before
You expect me to give it to you lol
And you are doing just fine here. I even offered you a nb in return, which you just refused
Doesn't matter. You agreed on a deal.
Like oj said: knight into 7 is a very well known gray area
Happens a lot. imo, the consensus on this site kinda seems to be that you get two
Yeah sure. I "lied". What are you gonna do about it?
Again, you are playing a game of strategy
U hit me 4 times in a row?
When u know black is ur threat too
you really can't expect to pick on everyone and then let them be okay lol
Who did I "pick" on? I mean, yeah, I can understand read being kinda mad (still overreacting tho) but oj? The robs were fair
Black had 3 devs and was ur army comp
if I were you I would just give red the ore
Look at his set up compared to mine
I guess, what are you going to do about it oj
I left the knight off him because I had played my last knight. Didnt want it straight back on me. He got a good mono. Without it, you'd be clearly ahead of him
Meanwhile, red might be on 8 here
Guess I didn't ruin his game by being "mean" after all
Dawg, you revenge robbed me too. You know that is not a good strat, right?
U hit me 4 times in a row
You asked me what I'm going to do about it blue
Guess winning ain't as important as spiting someone who didn't take your deal when you robbed him
Black is the only one playing rationally
What are you going to do about it
Horrible that u didn’t see he had the best set up and maybe to hit them?
